assignees: ""

## Problem this solves

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation you're running into.
     Focus on the "why" — what are you trying to accomplish?
     e.g. "I always have to manually reformat my resume when switching templates because..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.
     If you have a specific implementation idea, share it — but it's not required. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Are there workarounds you've tried? Other tools that handle this differently? -->

## Is this something you'd be willing to help build?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need some guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting it

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools — anything that helps explain the idea. -->
